title: paraprenanthes dolichophylla
intro: Paraprenanthes dolichophylla, also known as the long-leaved paraprenanthes or Chinese sweet-scented willow-herb, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Paraprenanthes dolichophylla include relief from fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Paraprenanthes dolichophylla can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
